degraded: complexity classifier returned touches_auth — a prose-keyword false positive (prior_source=keyword, history_n=0); the diff touches zero auth code (a new TS/JS hygiene scanner + CLI routing + two iterate reference docs + tests). Left at 'small'; F11 recomputes risk from diff-predicates.

surface_verification.justification: Framework tooling change: a new shared TS/JS test-hygiene scanner (ts_test_hygiene.py + _ts_lexer.py) + CLI routing in scan_test_hygiene.py + two iterate reference docs (F0.5.md, iteration-reviews.md) + tests. No runnable app surface (web/cli/api) added or modified. Exercised by the CLI surface (scan_test_hygiene.py --files/--diff on real .spec.ts fixtures: exit 0 clean / 1 findings / 2 usage) plus the pytest suites (shared 4115, iterate 476) and two real git-diff end-to-end probes (incl. chained .only.each flagged, conditional test.skip(cond) exempt, /test.only(/ regex not flagged) recorded in the iterate ADR Confidence Calibration.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — a test.skip/it.skip/describe.skip/test.fixme/xit/xfail OR a focused test (.only/fit/fdescribe) in a changed TS/JS spec without valid quarantine metadata fails the hygiene gate
AC2 — a properly-quarantined skip (reason+owner+ticket+future expires) passes; a missing field / malformed / past-expires quarantine fails

AC3 — the check runs post-Self-Review (CLI --diff, mandatory at medium+) and at F0.5 as the single mechanical gate (F11 does not re-run it; docs softened), diff-scoped by line so untouched legacy skips do not block; deleting a quarantine or editing expires still trips it
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_ts_test_hygiene.py::test_filter_drops_untouched_preexisting_skip + ::test_filter_expired_triggered_by_editing_quarantine_block + ::test_no_quarantine_scope_covers_comment_block_above + ::test_added_lines_from_diff PASSED; iteration-reviews.md §8 + F0.5.md wiring pinned by test_iteration_reviews_section_8.py PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC4 — comment/string/template awareness: a .only inside a // comment, a string literal, or a template is NOT flagged (no naive-regex false match), and multi-line templates keep line numbers

AC5 — footprint ≤300 LOC after the lexer was extracted into _ts_lexer.py (ts_test_hygiene.py 299, _ts_lexer.py 164, scan_test_hygiene.py 295, all test files ≤300); bloat baseline not ratcheted (no new crossing among the changed files)
behaviors.evidence: bloat_baseline.scan(): crossings among changed files == []; wc -l all changed source ≤300 (ADR Confidence Calibration probe)

behaviors.behavior: Reviewer hardening (OpenAI code-review MEDIUM) — valid-JS whitespace/newline around member access (test . skip / test\n.only) must not bypass the matcher
Doubt MUST-FIX 1 — chained modifiers do not evade: test.only.each / test.concurrent.only (focus) and test.skip.each / it.concurrent.skip (skip) are flagged
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_ts_test_hygiene_evasion.py::test_chained_modifiers_are_flagged PASSED; real git-diff probe (ADR Confidence Calibration)

behaviors.behavior: Doubt MUST-FIX 2 — regex-literal lexing: a backtick inside /`/ no longer blanks to EOF (a skip below is still flagged); /test.only(/ is not scanned as code; an unterminated template/string emits a LOUD could_not_lex finding, never a silent blank

Doubt MUST-FIX 3 — a runtime conditional test.skip(cond, 'reason') / test.fixme(cond, desc) / test.skip() (first arg not a string literal) is EXEMPT; the declaration form test.skip('name', fn) is still flagged
Doubt MUST-FIX 4 — global forms anchored so chart.fit(...) / obj.xit(...) after a dot do NOT false-flag a hard STOP; standalone fit(...) still flagged
Doubt MUST-FIX 5 — file gate widened to *.e2e.* + e2e//tests//__tests__/ dirs so a non-default testMatch (checkout.e2e.ts) is scanned; custom-testMatch/computed-access limit documented

Doubt SHOULD-FIX 6/8/9 — a >180-day-out expires fails (js.skip.expiry_too_far); deletion straddle re-trips a skip only when the deleted hunk carried quarantine content (not any nearby deletion); test.todo is flagged as a silent non-run
